title: prunus ovata
intro: Prunus ovata, also known as the Chinese plum or Japanese plum, is a species of plum tree native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Prunus ovata include reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of respiratory infections, while also providing antioxidant and cardiovascular support. Prunus ovata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried fruit, offering various herbal preparations for its medicinal and health benefits.
